title: PlannerPacket
description: Compact fresh-context packet for planner entry. A fresh worker loading this file gets the full picture without reading the whole repo.

trace_id.description: Trace ID of the current run.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this packet was generated.

run_result.description: Overall result of the run: PASS, HOLD, FAIL, ERROR.

current_context.description: One paragraph: what the system is, what phase it is in, what the last run achieved.

active_brief.description: The current task or phase goal in one sentence.

decision_tail.description: Last 10 decisions carried forward (JSON shadow); Markdown renders last 3. Empty on first run.

blocked_next_step.description: The OPEN_DECISION from bridge contract, or 'None'.

active_bottleneck.description: The highest-priority unresolved blocker. 'None' if no active blocker.
